name: Chicken in Lemon Grass and Chili (Ga Xao Xa Ot)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken and dry it well. Cut into small pieces.
2. Peel the garlic and slice finely.
3. Cut the onion into halves lengthwise, then cut each half into 1/2 inch strips.
4. Heat oil in a large frying pan over medium heat.
5. Add a pinch of salt, garlic, and onion to the pan. Fry until the onion becomes translucent.
6. Add lemon grass and chili. Cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
7. Add chicken and cook until lightly browned.
8. Stir in fish sauce, sugar, and caramel sauce. Mix well.
9. Add water and simmer for 45 minutes or until chicken is tender. Stir occasionally and add more water if necessary.
Makes 4 servings. CARAMEL SAUCE: Mix 1/2 cup sugar with 4 tablespoons water in a heavy saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium heat, then let boil until the mixture changes color. Reduce heat to low and continue heating until brown. Add an additional 1/2 cup of water, stir until dissolved, then remove from heat and store in a jar in the refrigerator.
